title: Perform basic tests
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Perform basic tests demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria.

elements.title: Interpret test requirements

pcs.text: Review test request to identify samples to be tested, test method and equipment involved
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Review test request to identify samples to be tested, test method and equipment involved?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Review test request to identify samples to be tested, test method and equipment involved.

pcs.text: Identify hazards and workplace controls associated with the sample, preparation methods, reagents and/or equipment
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify hazards and workplace controls associated with the sample, preparation methods, reagents and/or equipment?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify hazards and workplace controls associated with the sample, preparation methods, reagents and/or equipment.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Interpret test requirements

elements.title: Prepare sample

pcs.text: Match sample provided to accompanying documentation and report any discrepancies in accordance with workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Match sample provided to accompanying documentation and report any discrepancies in accordance with workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Match sample provided to accompanying documentation and report any discrepancies in accordance with workplace procedures.

pcs.text: Prepare sample in accordance with workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Prepare sample in accordance with workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Prepare sample in accordance with workplace procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Prepare sample

elements.title: Check equipment before use

pcs.text: Set up test equipment in accordance with test method
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Set up test equipment in accordance with test method?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Set up test equipment in accordance with test method.

pcs.text: Perform pre-use and safety checks in accordance with workplace procedures and manufacturer instructions
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Perform pre-use and safety checks in accordance with workplace procedures and manufacturer instructions?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Perform pre-use and safety checks in accordance with workplace procedures and manufacturer instructions.

pcs.text: Identify faulty or unsafe equipment and report to appropriate personnel
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify faulty or unsafe equipment and report to appropriate personnel?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify faulty or unsafe equipment and report to appropriate personnel.

pcs.text: Check calibration status of equipment and report any out-of-calibration items to appropriate personnel
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Check calibration status of equipment and report any out-of-calibration items to appropriate personnel?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Check calibration status of equipment and report any out-of-calibration items to appropriate personnel.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Check equipment before use

elements.title: Perform tests on samples

pcs.text: Identify, prepare and weigh or measure sample and standards to be tested
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify, prepare and weigh or measure sample and standards to be tested?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify, prepare and weigh or measure sample and standards to be tested.

pcs.text: Conduct tests in accordance with workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Conduct tests in accordance with workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Conduct tests in accordance with workplace procedures.

pcs.text: Record data in accordance with workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Record data in accordance with workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Record data in accordance with workplace procedures.

pcs.text: Perform any required calculations on data
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Perform any required calculations on data?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Perform any required calculations on data.

pcs.text: Identify and report out of specification or atypical results promptly to appropriate personnel
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and report out of specification or atypical results promptly to appropriate personnel?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and report out of specification or atypical results promptly to appropriate personnel.

pcs.text: Shut down equipment in accordance with operating procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Shut down equipment in accordance with operating procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Shut down equipment in accordance with operating procedures.
